MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PETCO ANIMAL SUPPLIES STORES, INC., INTERNATIONAL PET SUPPLIES & DISTRIBUTION, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM.
Appearances: Scott Righthand (544.0115) for plaintiff and responding party; Daniel Martinez of the Law Offices of Martinez & Martinez (707.528.3890) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs are given leave to allege, if they can do so in good faith, ultimate facts that support their request for punitive damages. Order signed.
